name: visa-sponsorship-checker
description: Offline UK sponsor checker for LinkedIn Jobs

scripts.test: node tests/matcher.test.js && node tests/url-utils.test.js && node tests/linkedin-extractor.test.js && node tests/job-list-scanner.test.js && node tests/country-data.test.js
scripts.validate: node tests/matcher.test.js && node tests/url-utils.test.js && node tests/linkedin-extractor.test.js && node tests/job-list-scanner.test.js && node tests/country-data.test.js && node --check popup/popup.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/job-list-scanner.js && python -B -m py_compile scripts/build-sponsor-index.py scripts/update-uk-register.py scripts/update-nl-register.py
